arts.ttl: Painting teams, cooking attacks - Pereira breaks down his Wolves tactics
arts.sum: Vitor Pereira came to Wolves with a blank canvas, a tactical philosophy - and a desire to paint a picture at Molineux.

arts.ttl: 'It’s like a picture' | Wolves boss illustrates fascinating tactical insight
arts.sum: Wolves head coach Vitor Pereira gives a fascinating tactical insight into his style of play.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Antony REPLACEMENT, Gittens ‘SPECIAL INTEREST’, Cunha to ARSENAL
arts.sum: Football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano has provided an in-depth update on the market, with Manchester United set to move for an Antony replacement as Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool monitor top talents around Europe. Man Utd winger Antony is set to leave Old Trafford and Romano says the Old Trafford club will be active in the market to replace the Real Betis-bound winger.

arts.ttl: Juventus to hold talks with Chelsea for Renato Veiga and Ben Chilwell
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus are soon going to hold talks with Chelsea in a move for Renato Veiga. Alfredo Pedulla has reported about the situation of the versatile defender, who…

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Wolves: Premier League
arts.sum: The Blues will be searching for their first win in six Premier League matches, after drawing 2–2 at home against Bournemouth last Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Report: AC Milan want to sign another Chelsea attacker as well as Joao Felix, the Blues are demanding £65m for him
Cole Palmer 'signs six-figure deal with Amazon to star in England documentary' as Three Lions target World Cup success
arts.sum: Filming has already started for the four-part series and it is set to be released in spring this year. Palmer was England's impact man off the bench at Euro 2024 scoring in the final.

arts.ttl: “Seriously interested” – Man United & Chelsea express desire to sign 14 G/A wonderkid
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly both interested in a potential transfer swoop for Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens. arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho has already sent Enzo Maresca clear message amid Chelsea transfer talks
arts.sum: There is no guarantee that Chelsea do make a move for the 20-year-old winger, but he is one of several players in that position the club are interested in. Speaking to Man United's media team in November 2022, Garnacho explained: "I've always liked to play out wide on the left, as a right-footed player able to cut inside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea hijack Arsenal transfer plan to sign William Saliba backup after worrying injury update
arts.sum: Chelsea appear to have dented Arsenal's hopes of finding a replacement for William Saliba, who was forced to miss the Gunners' clash against Aston Villa. "He wasn’t feeling good enough to play so we have to assess the situation," added Arteta.
